generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to stay vigilant. Recent events show that our current security measures are falling short. Just last month, a coordinated attack was thwarted at a major transportation hub, but only because of quick thinking by local law enforcement. Imagine if they didn't have the tools they needed? We can't afford to wait for another crisis to act. Strengthening domestic security powers isn't about restricting freedoms—it's about ensuring we have the flexibility to adapt to emerging threats. Our allies are already taking similar steps to protect their citizens. It's time we do the same. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
